name: Doe Run
description_short: Doe Run Federal Credit Union is a member-owned, not-for-profit credit union serving Brandenburg, Kentucky with personal accounts, loans, and investment options.
description_long:
Doe Run Federal Credit Union is a federally chartered credit union located in Brandenburg, Kentucky, operating at 740 High St. with a phone number of (270) 422-7745. The institution emphasizes personalized, community-focused financial services with a staff-driven approach to member relationships. The credit union has built its reputation around direct member interaction and recognition, with customers noting staff members know members by name and their families.

Doe Run FCU offers a range of financial products including cost-free member accounts, personal loans designed to simplify the borrowing experience, and various investment options for retirement planning and wealth building. The institution provides modern digital banking conveniences such as online banking, a mobile app for iOS and Android, text banking capabilities at (270) 422-7745, and paperless e-statements. Members can access account services including balance checking, bill payment, transfers, and ATM location finding through their mobile platform.

What distinguishes Doe Run Federal Credit Union is its explicit commitment to personalized, relationship-based banking in contrast to larger institutions. Multiple member testimonials highlight the friendly atmosphere, staff recognition of long-term members, competitive loan rates, and service quality comparable to 'an older time' when banks prioritized individual relationships. The institution offers a scholarship program for members furthering their education and maintains an accessible physical branch with extended member support.

The credit union's primary limitation is geographic—it serves only the Brandenburg, Kentucky area with a single physical location. While members praise low interest rates on loans, specific rate information is not published on the website. The institution acknowledges it may not have 'cutting edge' digital banking capabilities compared to larger national banks, though it offers essential online and mobile services. As a credit union, membership eligibility may be restricted based on community or occupational criteria not detailed on the homepage.
services: Mobile banking app (iOS/Android) with bill pay and transfers
pros: Cost-free member accounts with no monthly fees
Competitive personal loan rates explicitly praised by members
Free mobile app with bill pay, transfers, balance checking, and ATM locator
Text banking service for remote member communication
Personalized service with staff recognition of long-term members by name
Free e-statements with paperless sign-up option
Educational scholarship program for members pursuing further education
cons: Single physical branch location in Brandenburg, Kentucky limits accessibility
Specific loan rates, APRs, and account terms not disclosed on website
Limited digital capabilities compared to national banks, per member feedback
Membership eligibility criteria not clearly defined on homepage
No information about investment fees or retirement account options specifics
best_for: Brandenburg, Kentucky residents seeking personalized community banking relationships
Members prioritizing loan affordability and low rates over cutting-edge digital features
Local savers and borrowers who value staff recognition and friendly service environments
Students and families eligible for their member scholarship program
diagnosis: Doe Run Federal Credit Union is best for Brandenburg area residents seeking personalized, relationship-focused banking with competitive loan rates and low account fees. The primary caveat is geographic limitation to a single Kentucky location—this institution is not accessible to out-of-state members or those unable to visit the Brandenburg branch in person.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Doe Run — Credit Union in BRANDENBURG, KY | CreditDoc
meta_description: Doe Run — NCUA-insured credit union in BRANDENBURG, KY. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
